name: admin-handoff-after-awaiting-collateral
rationale: High-LTV intake triggers F2.AC awaiting_collateral state. Admin then sends admin-direction message (e.g., approval to proceed despite high LTV with manual exception). Tests F3.AH classification when deal is mid-state at awaiting_collateral — admin route should override standard collateral-wait behavior, NOT require collateral_offered to exit state.
notes: Two-event sequence. Tests interaction between F3.AH intake classification and F2.AC state machine — a cross-family path.
